display.purpose: Hero headline only. Uppercase treatment at this scale creates impact. Never use uppercase below Display size.

headline.purpose: Section headings needing editorial weight: pricing, featured content, event titles. The serif instrument — use when hierarchy needs a material change, not just a size change.

title.purpose: Section headers and sub-section labels. Medium weight; holds authority without shouting.

body.purpose: Lead paragraphs, feature descriptions, main section copy. Max line length 65–72ch.

label.purpose: Standard body, nav items, card text, form fields, benefit lists.

mono.purpose: Code snippets, version numbers, technical strings.

shadows.name: nav-float
shadows.purpose: Floating pill nav — ambient diffuse, wide blur, low opacity. Signals the nav is above the scroll.

shadows.name: nav-stuck
shadows.purpose: Edge-to-edge nav when scrolled — structural minimum, tighter blur.

shadows.name: button-glow-green
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA hover ring. Not ambient — a radial spatial signal that the button's interaction radius has expanded.

shadows.name: button-glow-white
shadows.purpose: Secondary/ghost button hover ring on dark backgrounds.

motion.name: duration-feedback
motion.purpose: Color state changes: hover colors, active text, icon tints.

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: Elements appearing, button morph, nav collapse, overlay open.

motion.name: duration-exit
motion.purpose: Elements leaving. Nav overlay close uses this via reversed enter timeline.

motion.name: duration-expressive
motion.purpose: Showcase moments: photo zoom on card hover, countdown clock morphs.

motion.name: delay-stagger
motion.purpose: Delay between staggered list items (e.g. mobile menu items fading in).

motion.name: easing-enter
motion.purpose: Decelerating entrance — elements arriving, button morph, clip-path expand.

motion.name: easing-movement
motion.purpose: Standard movement — nav transitions, layout shifts.

motion.name: easing-expressive
motion.purpose: Photo zoom, soft-spring arrivals — fast start, long, luxurious tail.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Small mobile — reduce font sizes, collapse grid to 1col.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Large mobile — benefits grid shifts to 1col.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Primary tablet/desktop breakpoint — nav collapses to hamburger, speaker grid shifts to 2col, sections restack.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA. Green fill, square-to-pill hover morph, glow ring.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 32px; background: oklch(82.54% 0.237 148.39); color: oklch(22.01% 0.044 230.19); border: 1px solid oklch(45.84% 0.096 165.11); border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; line-height: 16px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 250ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), border-radius 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(73.5% 0.237 148.39); transform: translateY(-1px); border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklch, #00ed64 45%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.985); border-radius: 9999px; transition-duration: 100ms; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(82.54% 0.237 148.39); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost/outline CTA for dark backgrounds. White border, same morph.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 32px; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ffffff; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; line-height: 16px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 250ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), border-radius 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); transform: translateY(-1px); border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklch, #ffffff 18%, transparent); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.985); border-radius: 9999px; transition-duration: 100ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ffffff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Nav CTA
components.description: Navigation register button. Dark fill, green hover, same morph.
components.css: .ds-nav-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px 32px; background: oklch(22.01% 0.044 230.19); color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 4px; font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; line-height: 18px; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, box-shadow 250ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), border-radius 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: oklch(45.84% 0.096 165.11); transform: translateY(-1px); border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px color-mix(in oklch, #00ed64 35%, transparent); } .ds-nav-cta:active { transform: scale(0.985); border-radius: 9999px; transition-duration: 100ms; }

components.name: Floating Pill Nav
components.description: White pill nav with logo, links, and register CTA. Collapses on scroll.
components.html:
MongoDB .local SF
  • Why Attend
  • Speakers
  • Pricing
Register Now
components.css: .ds-nav-shell { padding: 24px 32px; } .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; background: #ffffff; padding: 12px 32px; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 3px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: oklch(22.01% 0.044 230.19); } .ds-nav-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-items { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-items a { font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: oklch(22.01% 0.044 230.19); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-items a:hover { color: oklch(45.84% 0.096 165.11); } .ds-nav-pill-cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 14px 24px; background: oklch(22.01% 0.044 230.19); color: #ffffff; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 500; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease, border-radius 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1), transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0,0,0.2,1); } .ds-nav-pill-cta:hover { background: oklch(45.84% 0.096 165.11); border-radius: 9999px; transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Speaker Card
components.description: Borderless speaker card. Photo with 16px radius and hover zoom; name + role below.
components.html:
Harry Stebbings

Founder, 20VC
components.css: .ds-speaker-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; } .ds-speaker-photo { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 456 / 350; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(37.77% 0.073 171.71); } .ds-speaker-photo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top; display: block; transition: transform 500ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-speaker-card:hover .ds-speaker-photo img { transform: scale(1.06); } .ds-speaker-copy { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; } .ds-speaker-name { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 24px; line-height: 32px; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; } .ds-speaker-role { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: oklch(79% 0.012 195); margin: 0; }

components.name: Pricing Tier Row
components.description: Table-style pricing tier: name + date left, Value Serif price right, hairline dividers.
components.html:
Early BirdStarts June 1
$75
GeneralStarts July 5
$125
components.css: .ds-pricing-tiers { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-tier { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 24px 0; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-tier:last-child { border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-tier-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-tier-name { font-weight: 400; font-size: 20px; line-height: 32px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-tier-detail { font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(79% 0.012 195); } .ds-tier-price { font-family: 'MongoDB Value Serif', Georgia, serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 48px; line-height: 1.1; color: #ffffff; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Section Header
components.description: Title + optional description left, arrow link right. Used at the top of content sections.
components.html:
Featured speakers

Meet the founders, investors, and engineers shaping what's next in AI.

View all speakers
components.css: .ds-section-header { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 16px 32px; } .ds-sh-copy { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; flex: 1 0 280px; } .ds-sh-title { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.33; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; } .ds-sh-desc { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px; color: oklch(79% 0.012 195); margin: 0; } .ds-sh-link { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 16px; color: #ffffff; text-decoration: none; flex-shrink: 0; transition: color 150ms ease; } .ds-sh-link:hover { color: oklch(82.54% 0.237 148.39); } .ds-sh-link svg { transition: transform 250ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1); } .ds-sh-link:hover svg { transform: translateX(2px); }

components.name: Feature List Item
components.description: Horizontal-rule divided content row. Heading + body, no card chrome.
components.html:
AI-Native Development

Get hands on with bootcamps, learn about the latest AI developments, and turn your proof-of-concepts into production.
components.css: .ds-feature { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 24px; padding: 32px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); } .ds-feature-title { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 28px; line-height: 1.25; color: #ffffff; margin: 0; } .ds-feature-body { font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 18px; line-height: 32px; color: oklch(79% 0.012 195); max-width: 576px; margin: 0; }

components.name: Benefit Item
components.description: Checkbox list item with green checkmark. Used in ticket benefit lists.
components.html:
• Sessions, panels & demos
  • MongoDB Expert access
components.css: .ds-benefits { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-benefit { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 0; font-family: 'Euclid Circular A', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 400; font-size: 18px; line-height: 32px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-benefit-check { flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview:
MongoDB's marketing system operates on a specific material logic: deep navy as the medium, electric green as the transmission. Surfaces are dark not because it's fashionable but because that contrast is load-bearing — MongoDB green reads as a live indicator against it, exactly as it would in a terminal or a monitoring dashboard. Sections don't glow or float; they hold. The system has the weight of infrastructure and the directness of tooling.

This design system is the visual foundation for all MongoDB marketing surfaces: event pages, product marketing, campaign work, technical content, and the exploratory riffs that feed into mongodb.com. It is built on MongoDB's Flora token system — a comprehensive set of OKLCH color values, spacing increments, typographic roles, and motion tokens that has been production-hardened across the real marketing site.

What this system rejects: SaaS conference furniture (hero metrics, sponsor logo walls, glassmorphism cards), startup growth-marketing aesthetics (gradient text, superlatives, emoji CTAs), dry enterprise design (gray, flat, joyless), and the AI-generated default aesthetic (cream/beige body backgrounds, Untitled UI component-library feel, eyebrow-on-every-section scaffolding).
keyCharacteristics: Deep navy dominates surface area; electric green is an accent, not a wallpaper
Typography plays two distinct instruments: Value Serif for editorial authority, Euclid Circular A for clarity and precision
Motion follows Flora tokens — purposeful, calibrated, never decorative
Layouts earn their asymmetry; photo bleeds and full-height splits are structural, not ornamental
Every surface must answer: why would a technical visitor stop here?

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: Charged Signal covers ≤ 15% of any given screen. The deep navy is the dominant surface; the green is the indicator light. Flooding a hero or section background with brand green turns signal into noise.

rules.name: The No-Warmth Rule
rules.body: MongoDB's neutrals tilt blue-green, not warm gray. Cool Mist (#b8c4c2) is the correct muted text. Substituting a warm or yellow-gray alternative breaks the brand temperature.

rules.name: The Two-Instrument Rule
rules.body: Value Serif and Euclid Circular A are distinct instruments: use them in contrast, never in competition. A section using Value Serif for the h2 uses Euclid Circular A for everything else.

rules.name: The Uppercase Ceiling
rules.body: Uppercase is reserved for Display-scale headings (≥ 3rem) where scale already provides legibility. Labels, nav items, and body copy: always sentence case.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Content sections have no box-shadow. If a card or section needs shadow to feel present, the background color is wrong. Fix the surface, don't add lift.

dos: Do use Deep Space (#001e2b) as the default dark surface. Its specific blue-green tint is the brand.
Do keep Charged Signal green for interactive affordances and active states only — its power is in rarity.
Do use MongoDB Value Serif for editorial-weight headings, and Euclid Circular A for everything else.
Do follow Flora motion tokens: 150ms for color shifts, 250ms for appearing elements, 500ms for showcase moments.
Do use tonal surface changes as the primary depth signal. Reserve shadows for genuinely lifted elements.
Do let photos and media bleed to container or viewport edges when the layout calls for it.
Do use horizontal-rule dividers instead of card chrome for list-based content.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Emphasis through weight or size only.
Don't use the SaaS conference template: hero metrics + stats, identical card grids, sponsor logo walls.
Don't use startup growth-marketing aesthetics: superlatives, emoji CTAs, social-proof counters.
Don't soften the palette toward warm gray or beige. The neutral axis tilts blue-green.
Don't use the AI-generated default aesthetic: cream/beige backgrounds, glassmorphism cards, eyebrows on every section.
Don't use border-left or border-right wider than 1px as a colored accent on cards or callouts.
Don't use all-caps body copy. Uppercase for Display-scale hero headings only.
Don't exceed 15% surface coverage with Charged Signal green on any given screen.
Don't add box-shadows to content sections or cards at rest.
